demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach feels like it's burning a hole through to my back, and I just vomited up a large bowl of dark, coffee-ground blood. I'm on the bathroom floor and I can barely move.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has been unbearable for two days and about an hour ago I threw up a huge amount of dark blood with some fresh red in it, and now I feel like I'm going to pass out.

symptom_narrative.onset: The burning stomach pain has been getting much worse over the last 48 hours; the vomiting of blood started about an hour ago.
symptom_narrative.duration: Two days of escalating pain; the blood vomiting began roughly an hour ago.
symptom_narrative.character: A severe burning, boring pain high in the stomach that goes straight through to my back, then I brought up a large bowl of dark coffee-ground blood mixed with some fresh red blood.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The worst pain I have ever had — completely intolerable, and now I feel terrifyingly weak.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: High up in the middle of my stomach, going through to my back.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Constant and steadily getting worse; it has not eased at all.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Nothing helps — my strong prescription acid tablets have never made any difference.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: It has just kept getting worse on its own over the last two days.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've had months of watery diarrhoea and bad heartburn/reflux, I've lost about 10 kg without trying, and my stools have been pale and greasy. Since vomiting the blood I feel faint, pale and clammy.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had severe stomach ulcers for over a year that keep coming back and never settle no matter how much acid medication I take.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've collapsed on the bathroom floor and I'm too weak to get up.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Severe recurring stomach ulcers for over a year that don't respond to strong acid medication
past_medical_history.how_managed: maximum-strength prescription acid tablets, which have not helped

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Chronic watery diarrhoea and greasy, pale stools
Unintentional weight loss of about 10 kg

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone; made the call for help himself while unable to get up off the bathroom floor.

objective_data_offered.value: I'm very pale, sweaty and clammy, and I feel faint like I might pass out
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-described over the phone; no device measurement available

objective_data_offered.value: I vomited a large bowl of dark coffee-ground blood mixed with some fresh red blood
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate of volume and appearance; not clinician-inspected

objective_data_offered.value: I feel extremely weak and shaky and my heart feels like it's racing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective sensation; no measured pulse or blood pressure
